calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Aug-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Koplowitz for petitioner and executor Conrad Donner.
Thu Nguyen for sole beneficiary University of California at San Francisco (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

Mr. Koplowitz confirmed that the executor, Conrad Donner, had passed away. Counsel indicated that an ex parte application would be filed to appoint a special administrator for the limited purpose of making final distribution, noting time-sensitive tax considerations. Counsel represented that the estate was fully liquid and ready for distribution, subject to appointment of a successor fiduciary.

The Court stated that proceeding by ex parte application was appropriate and discussed scheduling in light of the timing requirements. After reviewing its calendar, the Court authorized counsel to set their ex parte application for hearing on March 3, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. in Department 202.

The pending petition for final distribution was taken off calendar.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Feb-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 10, 2018, is admitted to probate. Conrad Donner is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $940,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To Apr-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
